title: Looking Back and Moving Forward
text: Looking back at past experiences helps people understand themselves better. Mariam often thinks about her past decisions and what she learned from them.

Some choices brought success, while others caused challenges. Instead of regretting mistakes, Mariam uses them to make better decisions in the future. She believes that personal growth comes from reflection and action.
By learning from the past and planning for the future, Mariam feels more confident and prepared for what comes next.

questions.question: Why does Mariam think about her past?
How does Mariam view her mistakes?
questions.answer: She sees them as learning opportunities

questions.question: What helps Mariam feel confident about the future?
questions.answer: Learning from the past and planning ahead

questions.question: Why is reflection important?
questions.answer: Because it helps improve future decisions

questions.question: What can we learn about personal growth from Mariam’s story?
questions.answer: That it comes from experience and reflection

questions.question: In your opinion, how can reflecting on the past help your future?
questions.answer: It can help people make better decisions and grow from experience
